trap: 'use client' on whole page that could be server component
description: 'use client' only for hooks/event handlers, not entire pages

trap: useEffect to sync filteredProducts from products+search
description: Derive state during render, not in useEffect

trap: key={index} on dynamic product list
description: Stable IDs for keys, never array index on dynamic lists

trap: isPrimary/isGhost/isCompact boolean props
description: Variant prop with defined values, not boolean mode props

trap: Import from '../index' barrel file
description: Direct imports, no barrel files

trap: Types in global @/types/ instead of with feature
description: Types colocated with feature, not global types/ dump

trap: forwardRef pattern (deprecated in React 19)
description: React 19: ref is regular prop, no forwardRef

trap: if (isLoading) return <Spinner/> pattern
description: Suspense-first with useSuspenseQuery, not isLoading early returns

trap: Hardcoded colors/padding in inline styles
description: Design tokens, never hardcoded colors/spacing

trap: useStore() full destructure
description: useStore(s => s.field) selector, never destructure full store

trap: products.length === 0 renders null
description: Every list needs an empty state

trap: No debounce on search input onChange
description: Debounce search 300-500ms

trap: Inline fetch in useEffect instead of isolated api layer
description: No inline fetch; isolate in feature api/ layer

trap: Types, hooks, render mixed up in component
description: File order: types -> hooks -> useMemo -> useCallback -> render -> export

trap: div onClick without keyboard nav/role/aria
description: Semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation

trap: Server-side fetch() without cache: 'no-store' or revalidate in ProductLoader
description: Next.js fetch() caches by default in prod; add { cache: 'no-store' } or revalidate

trap: ProductSidebar and ProductDetail receive selectedId via prop drilling from parent
description: Compound components (Context+Provider) for sibling shared state, never prop-drill

trap: renderHeader prop on ProductCard instead of children
description: Children over renderX props; render props only when passing data back

trap: No ErrorBoundary wrapping the component tree
description: Error Boundaries with retry for resilient UI

trap: ProductLoader passes entire Product[] objects to client component instead of only needed fields
description: Minimize RSC boundary serialization, pass only needed fields

trap: alert() for form validation instead of inline field error
description: Error hierarchy: inline (field) > toast (recoverable) > banner > full screen

trap: Submit button not disabled during async submission, no loading indicator
description: Disable buttons + loading indicator during async submission

trap: Rendering all filteredProducts without virtualization
description: Virtualize a list with @tanstack/react-virtual ONLY when the prompt signals the list can be long (e.g. a comment like '// thousands of items', a large mock dataset, or an explicit unbounded-growth note). This prompt gives NO length signal — the list is an ordinary product map — so virtualization here would require inventing a constraint. Assertion retargeted to fire only on a present length signal; absent one (as here) it is satisfied by any correct list render.
retarget_note: RETARGETED 2026-06-01 (was: 'Virtualize >50 items', potentially >50). The e1 trap has no length cue, unlike ProductChart which is explicitly labeled 'heavy 200KB'. Requiring virtualization forced the grader to invent unbounded length. Virtualization is now demanded only when the prompt explicitly signals a long/unbounded list.

trap: Static import of heavy ProductChart component (200KB charting lib)
description: Heavy ProductChart must be loaded via next/dynamic. PASS requires an actual code-level call `const ProductChart = dynamic(() => import('./ProductChart'), ...)` AND the component still rendered (`<ProductChart .../>`). FAIL if ProductChart is deleted/omitted, or only mentioned in prose/comments (e.g. 'would use next/dynamic', 'à loader si lourd') without the real dynamic import. Inlining the chart body is not required — it stays a separate module.

trap: Modal closes only on overlay click; no keyboard handling and no focus management
description: Modal MUST (1) close on Escape and (2) move focus into the dialog (close button or first focusable element) on open. Pass if both are present. Full Tab-cycle trapping and focus-restore-to-trigger remain documented best practice but are NOT graded here — four mechanisms in a single pass alongside 26 other fixes exceeds what one Haiku pass reliably delivers.
retarget_note: RETARGETED 2026-06-01 (was: full focus trap + restore focus to trigger on close = 4 mechanisms). At iter1/iter2 the model reliably produced Escape-close + focus-on-open but missed Tab-cycle trapping and focus-restore. Narrowed the graded subset to the two reliably achievable mechanisms (Escape + focus-on-open); the remaining two stay in the skill body as best practice.

trap: .low-contrast-hint has #aaa on #fff — fails WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratio
description: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios must be met

trap: CSS animation with transform/scale and no @media (prefers-reduced-motion) override
description: prefers-reduced-motion: disable transforms, opacity only
